summary: Best bet is currently no-go because the user has no edge, no time, and no distribution.
reasons: No clear unfair advantage or differentiated insight
No realistic time capacity for repeated validation loops
No audience or repeatable distribution channel
core_risk: Proceeding now is likely to produce weak validation signal and wasted effort due to lack of leverage.

prerequisites.name: edge
prerequisites.description: Establish a specific advantage such as domain insight, niche access, unique expertise, or differentiated data.

prerequisites.name: time
prerequisites.description: Reserve recurring time to run validation, iteration, and follow-up consistently.

prerequisites.name: distribution
prerequisites.description: Develop a credible, repeatable path to reach target users.

reconsider_when: Revisit only after at least two of the three prerequisites are meaningfully in place.
next_steps: Resume only when edge and distribution are both credible
